request.user_text: 使用sort命令对ls -l的输出内容进行排序，注意选择不同字段进行排序；

operation.command:
set -e
ls -l | sort -k5 -h | head -20
ls -l | sort -k6,7 -M
ls -l | sort -k9

risk.reason: LLM assessed: The command uses 'set -e' for error handling and then performs safe read-only operations: listing directories and sorting output. No file modification or system changes.
risk.llm_reason: The command uses 'set -e' for error handling and then performs safe read-only operations: listing directories and sorting output. No file modification or system changes.
